models.label: SpotUNet production (bundled)
models.notes: SRO-augmented edge-decoupled detector; best on CuNb/ZrNb/SPED-Ag, parameter-free with auto-calibration. Beats WNCC on crystalline 4D-STEM.

models.label: SpotUNet base16 (legacy)
models.notes: Earlier edge-trained detector. Kept as a fallback.
